reviews.comment:
no "tienen sistema" para serviclub se ve q es "normal". El shop CARISIMO. El mas caro desde Bs As. Un agua saborizada 70 mangos! un heladito de agua $50. La sra en atencion seca, repsetuosa pero ni mirarla se puede q te contesta. Gracias, paso de largo la prox.

(Translated by Google)
They don't "have a system" for Serviclub, it seems like it's "normal." The shop is VERY EXPENSIVE. The most expensive in Buenos Aires. Flavored water costs 70 pesos! An ice cream cone $50. The lady in charge of customer service is rude and respectful, but you can't even look at her and she won't answer you. Thanks, I'll skip the next one.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnOS1LMG1nRRAB
